name: Sprott Inc.
description: Sprott Inc. is a global asset manager specializing in precious metals and critical materials investments. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, the firm provides investors with specialized investment strategies, including physical bullion trusts, exchange-traded funds (ETFs), managed equities, and private resource-focused lending solutions. With a deep focus on natural resources, Sprott leverages its extensive industry expertise and relationships to offer unique access to gold, silver, uranium, copper, and other critical materials. The company’s common shares are publicly traded on both the New York Stock Exchange and the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SII.
